rules.rule_text:
title: Disabling Security Tools - Builtin
id: 49f5dfc1-f92e-4d34-96fa-feba3f6acf36
related:
- id: e3a8a052-111f-4606-9aee-f28ebeb76776
  type: derived
status: test
description: Detects disabling security tools
references:
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1562.004/T1562.004.md
author: "\xD6mer G\xFCnal, Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community"
date: 2020-06-17
modified: 2022-11-26
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1562.004
logsource:
  product: linux
  service: syslog
detection:
  keywords:
  - stopping iptables
  - stopping ip6tables
  - stopping firewalld
  - stopping cbdaemon
  - stopping falcon-sensor
  condition: keywords
falsepositives:
- Legitimate administration activities
level: medium
